item.title: Routine_analysis_in_bioinformatics
item.description: Why? There are two main reasons why I want to record these routine pipelines: (1) save some time if Routine pipeline 1: RNA-seq (ref: https://rumball.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) To be continued …

item.title: Routine_pipelines_in_bioinformatics
item.description: Why? There are lots of packages dealing with various routine analysis in bioinformatics. Many of them are R packages Routine analysis 1: volcano plot To be continued …
